utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: So where are we going next ?

utterances.speaker: Gary
utterances.text: This witness will not return my calls so we are gonna see if we can surprise him coming home .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Sur ... surprise him ? We are not , we are not gonna make anybody mad are we ?

emotion_cause.span: 3_we are not gonna make anybody mad are we ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Come on man ! Listen so uh , are you gonna squeeze the perps shoes a little bit before he lawyers up ?

emotion_cause.span: 3_we are not gonna make anybody mad are we ?

utterances.speaker: Gary
utterances.text: It is a witness not a perp . And no one talks like that !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yeah , no one talks like that !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh what ? Like your Mr . Cop !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hey , I am more cop than you two !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hello ! I am in the front seat , okay ? I am Gary partner !
